✦ a little something for us bub ✦

Happy Anniversary
My Love

✦   you know where to find me   ✦

Every moment baby which we have shared till today is the most precious time to me baby 💟... it means the World to me...🤍...
we have came really really so far and im so proud of us babe... This anniversary is the best day for me love 💕 really the best i can't imagine how much happy i really am...I just wannna be with you my love 💗...
each and every second i spend with you is worth the distance bub... and we promise to be soon together...💗

just a small letter for you bub 🤍

My darling,


Putting my feelings in words doens't feel enough for us baby, but I'll do it anyways... my baby, im the proudest of you ever 🤍... you been the best man ever, like ever and ever 💟... You are the best son your parents could have, you are the best brother, you the bestest best buddy for someone, you the greatest great husband to me baby....and i could never be grateful for you enough, there's soo muchhhh gratitude i have for you baby you can't imagine... you are the best thing that can happen to anyone in their life and im the luckiest woman alive on this planet who gets to be your wife my bub 💗....
i can't ever imagine my life without you, 💕🫂....
there's this really important thing i wanna say baby, before meeting you i was a completely different person, the past and everything else really broke me, but ever since you came in my life, i know what happiness is, and for me it's you my love 💕... you are my everything, i got to know what love is when you came in my life and i never knew i was capable of receiving and giving this amount of love which can never be measured and it's all possible only because of you my lovely husband 💟..
Thankuuuu sooooo muchhhhh honeyyy 🌷 for everything my love, each and every second that you been with me i really appreciated it..
I promise to love you to forever and ever baby, 💗 and cherish our each and every moment of life... I love you so much 💗...sooooooooo muchhhhhhhhhh 🤍.


Forever yours, always 💗

a little note ✦
hey bae,
All this distance baby, and our love only keep increasing, all the moments we shared, the lovely talks, the laughs, the sad things..i adore them
And we never failed to bond together, our bond just got stronger and stronger...
especially i wanna say here, I loved our intimate time we shared, it really made us feel loved baby, physically, sensually and always genuinely bae 💗...It had a one of major roles in our bonding and our relationship babe...I really love it, how we show each other affection even tho far and can help into each other's fantasy with pure love 🤍...i adore that of us...
Thankuu for loving me baby, 💗 You made me feel loved even when i was insecure of myself and it's the most beautiful feeling for me to be loved by you in all ways 💟
— Your bae, muahhhh ✦
